amendment_contents_summary.scope: Adds three new rewriter categories to PROP-041 Phase 2: F (editorial section-split, propose-only, Phase 2.1 deferred), G (internal forward-reference preview, Phase 2 immediate), H (outbound link-out preview, narrowed scope per addendum, Phase 2 immediate).
amendment_contents_summary.regression_status: all PASS (RC-7 required prerequisite patch GH.0 — embedded in proposal)
amendment_contents_summary.phasing_recommendation: Phase 2 (G+H) ships first; Phase 2.1 (F) after operator validates G/H workflow. Operator may elect single-phase if architecture audit clean.

findings.addendum_compliance: Amendment honors the 2026-05-16 EXP-401 compression-experiment addendum: Category H narrowed to mechanical link-preview only (no whole-paragraph content compression). Q-OP F-Q5 records F as NOT WIN-eligible. Q-OP H-Q4 records H as NOT the operational mechanism for D-C. Suggested follow-up: separate PROP-042 for analyst-commissioned content-compression mode (the D-C operational mechanism). Logged as Q-OP-A002-4 for operator decision.

findings.description: Disk pressure observed at run start: / partition 98% used (283MB free). /tmp/edit-clone (552MB, 6h old) is the largest single contributor.
evidence: Auto-cleanup empowerment NOT triggered (project-footprint > 500MB is met, but no /tmp/*-clone older than 24h)
findings.action_taken: None. Cleanup empowerment requires both project-footprint > 500MB AND an aged clone (>24h, with edit-clone special-case <2h exclusion). Only the first condition is met. Operator-side cleanup recommended if this is a persistent pattern.
findings.recommended_followup: If 100%-disk events recur within 24h, operator should evaluate raising the auto-cleanup threshold or running manual cleanup on /tmp/edit-clone.
